name: kaswin
description: Kaswin, a single-file Mainnet and Testnet 10 raffle dApp for Kaspa Toccata.

scripts.compile:contract: node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_refund_v16 && node scripts/compile-raffle-contract.mjs raffle_round_v16
scripts.verify: npm run build && node scripts/verify-single-file.mjs && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-chain-randomness.mjs && node scripts/verify-web-requirements.mjs && node scripts/verify-mainnet-readiness.mjs && node scripts/verify-batch-refund-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-million-users.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer-package.mjs && node scripts/verify-indexer.mjs
scripts.verify:covenant: npm run build && node scripts/verify-covenant-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-chain-randomness.mjs
